name: loader
title: Loader
description: Text-treatment loading state (no spinner) — `pulse` breathes opacity, `shimmer` sweeps a highlight through the label; optional staggered dots.

files.content:
# Loader

Text-treatment loading state (no spinner) — `pulse` breathes opacity, `shimmer` sweeps a highlight through the label; optional staggered dots.

```jsx
<Loader variant="shimmer">Searching the workspace</Loader>
<Loader dots>Thinking</Loader>
```
